meta_description: JLCCNC offers precision sheet metal fabrication services—cutting, bending, forming, assembly, and surface finishes. Request a quote today.

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Fabrication
sections.text: Sheet Metal Fabrication Precision sheet metal cutting and complex bending Diverse materials and finishes Parts as fast as 2 days Get Instant Quote

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Fabrication Services
sections.text: Sheet Metal Fabrication Services Sheet Metal Cutting Laser cutting and punching of various sheet metal materials. Sheet Metal Forming Right-angle bending, U-shape, V-shape, or step bending, and hemming. Sheet Metal Assembly Laser welding. Riveting and fastening. Sheet Metal Finishing Various surface finishing options: anodizing, powder coating, brushing, etc.

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Capabilities
sections.text: Sheet Metal Capabilities Feature Description Maximum Length 800mm Sheet Thickness 0.5 / 0.8 / 1.0 / 1.2 / 1.5 / 2.0 / 2.5 / 3.0 / 4.0 / 5.0 / 6.0mm General Tolerances ± 0.2mm Cutting Tolerances ± 0.1mm Bending Tolerances ± 0.3mm Bend angle Tolerances ± 1.0° Punching Tolerances ± 0.1mm Lead Time 2 - 5 business days Learn more about Sheet Metal Capabilities >

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Materials
sections.text: Sheet Metal Materials Aluminum 5052 Characteristic: Aluminum 5052 offers excellent corrosion resistance and formability. With more magnesium than 6061, it’s easy to weld and machine, making it great for marine and chemical applications. Lead Time: As fast as 2 days Finishing Options: Anodizing, Hardcoat Anodizing, Powder Coating, Silkscreen, Laser marking. Learn more > Stainless Steel 201 Characteristic: Stainless steel 201 offers moderate resistance to acids and alkalis, features high density, and exhibits excellent surface finish with no visible porosity or pinholes after polishing. Lead Time: As fast as 2 days Finishing Options: Brushing, Powder Coating, Silkscreen, Laser marking. Learn...

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Surface Finishes
sections.text: Sheet Metal Surface Finishes Standard Parts are machined and deburred with no additional surface finish. Visible machining marks, light surface scratches. Anodizing Anodizing creates a corrosion-resistant, uniform, matte or glossy finish. Parts can be anodized in different colors—black, red, and gold are most common. Hardcoat Anodizing A type of anodizing that produces a thicker and harder coating on the surface, resulting in increased wear resistance and durability. Conductive Anodizing An anodizing process that creates a conductive oxide layer on the surface, typically used for EMl/RFl shielding or electrical grounding applications. Powder Coating Electrostatic dry powder application cure...

sections.heading: FAQs About Sheet Metal Manufacturing
sections.text: FAQs About Sheet Metal Manufacturing Q: Does JLCCNC offer surface finishing services for custom sheet metal parts? Yes, we provide anodizing, powder coating, laser marking, and other surface finishes, so your sheet metal parts are both durable and visually professional. Q: What’s the minimum width at the center of the bent U-shaped structure? The minimum center width required for U-shaped bends is specified by material thickness: - 1 mm thickness: minimum center width 12 mm - 2 mm thickness: minimum center width 12 mm - 3 mm thickness: minimum center width 18 mm - 4 mm thickness: minimum center width 20 mm - 5 mm thickness: minimum center width 23 mm - 6 mm thickness: minimum center width 2...
